pages.title: Nebula Lens
pages.text: A remnant of distortion, anti-magic, and retaliatory repositioning. The Lens is at its best when being attacked is merely the first mistake your enemy makes.

pages.title: Dormant and Latent
pages.text: $(l)Dormant$(): Greatly reduces incoming magic damage and prevents ender pearl self-damage. Water remains dangerous, making the bearer unstable.$(br2)$(l)Latent$(): Arcane resistance becomes even stronger, pushing the Lens further toward an anti-sorcery relic before its real signature power fully wakes.

pages.title: Awakened, Ascended, Transcendent, Apex
pages.text: $(l)Awakened$(): The Lens unlocks $(thing)Reactive Blink$(). Some attacks are negated as the bearer blinks away, and the next hit becomes heavily empowered.$(br2)$(l)Ascended$(): Blink triggers more often, and the stored retaliation grows harsher.$(br2)$(l)Transcendent$(): The next strike becomes more punishing still, and successful blinks grant a brief burst of speed.$(br2)$(l)Apex$(): The Lens reaches its cruelest state, with the highest blink chance and the strongest post-blink retaliation.
